title: anaphalis margaritacea subsp. angustior
intro: Anaphalis margaritacea subsp. angustior, also known as narrow-leaved pearly everlasting, is a subspecies of flowering plant in the family Asteraceae. It is a perennial herb with white or pinkish flowers and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of Anaphalis margaritacea subsp. angustior include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce inflammation and improve digestive health. Herbal preparations of Anaphalis margaritacea subsp. angustior can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
